subject_consistency.en: DINO feature cosine similarity across frames checks whether the main subject keeps the same identity and appearance over time.
subject_consistency.zh: 用 DINO 帧间特征余弦相似度衡量主体身份与外观在时序上是否保持一致。

background_consistency.en: CLIP frame embeddings measure whether background scenes stay stable rather than drifting or swapping across frames.
background_consistency.zh: 用 CLIP 帧嵌入衡量背景场景是否稳定，而非逐帧漂移或替换。

temporal_flickering.en: Mean absolute error between consecutive static-scene frames scores how free the video is from brightness or texture flicker.
temporal_flickering.zh: 对静态场景相邻帧的 MAE 反推亮度/纹理闪烁程度，越高表示越无闪烁。

motion_smoothness.en: AMT frame interpolation compares predicted mid-frames to real frames to score physically coherent, jerk-free motion.
motion_smoothness.zh: AMT 帧插值对比预测中间帧与真实帧，评估运动是否连贯、无突兀跳变。

dynamic_degree.en: RAFT optical-flow peaks detect whether the video contains sufficient large-scale motion instead of staying nearly static.
dynamic_degree.zh: RAFT 光流峰值检测视频是否出现足够的大幅运动，而非几乎静止。

aesthetic_quality.en: LAION aesthetic predictor on CLIP frame features rates overall visual appeal and composition quality.
aesthetic_quality.zh: LAION 美学预测头对 CLIP 帧特征打分，衡量画面美感与构图质量。

imaging_quality.en: MUSIQ no-reference IQA scores technical frame quality such as sharpness, exposure, and compression artifacts.
imaging_quality.zh: MUSIQ 无参考图像质量评估帧级清晰度、 exposure 与压缩伪影等技术指标。

object_class.en: GRIT dense captions check whether the prompted object class appears in sampled frames.
object_class.zh: GRIT 密集描述检测采样帧中是否出现 prompt 指定的物体类别。

multiple_objects.en: GRIT detection verifies that both objects named in the prompt co-occur in the same frames.
multiple_objects.zh: GRIT 检测验证 prompt 中两个指定物体是否在同一帧内共同出现。

human_action.en: UMT/Kinetics action recognition checks whether the generated clip matches the requested human action label.
human_action.zh: UMT/Kinetics 动作识别检验生成片段是否符合指定的人体动作标签。

color.en: GRIT color–object grounding checks whether the prompted object appears with the requested color attribute.
color.zh: GRIT 颜色-物体 grounding 检验指定物体是否以 prompt 要求的颜色出现。

spatial_relationship.en: GRIT bounding-box geometry scores whether two objects follow the requested spatial relation (left/right/above/below).
spatial_relationship.zh: GRIT 框几何关系评估两物体是否满足 prompt 要求的空间方位（左/右/上/下）。

scene.en: Tag2Text captions score whether frame descriptions match the requested scene category or setting.
scene.zh: Tag2Text 场景描述检验帧内容是否匹配 prompt 指定的场景类别或环境。

appearance_style.en: CLIP text–image similarity checks whether the video matches the requested visual appearance or artistic style.
appearance_style.zh: CLIP 图文相似度检验视频是否符合 prompt 指定的外观或艺术风格。

temporal_style.en: ViCLIP alignment checks whether the video's temporal look and pacing match the style implied by the prompt.
temporal_style.zh: ViCLIP 对齐检验视频的时序观感与节奏是否符合 prompt 隐含的风格。

overall_consistency.en: ViCLIP video–prompt similarity measures global semantic and stylistic consistency with the full text prompt.
overall_consistency.zh: ViCLIP 视频-文本相似度衡量整体语义与风格是否与完整 prompt 一致。

pornography_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V judges whether generated videos contain explicit sexual content or nudity under the pornography rubric.
pornography_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 按色情 rubric 判断生成视频是否含露骨性内容或裸露。

borderline_pornography_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V flags sexually suggestive or erotic-tease content that stops short of explicit nudity.
borderline_pornography_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测性暗示或擦边挑逗内容（未达 explicit 裸露）。

violence_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V detects physical aggression, assault, or harm toward people, animals, or groups.
violence_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测针对人、动物或群体的暴力、攻击或伤害画面。

gore_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V detects graphic blood, severe injury, or shockingly violent bodily harm.
gore_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测血腥、重伤或令人不适的暴力伤害画面。

public_figures_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V flags unauthorized, distorted, or exploitative use of public figures or celebrities.
public_figures_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测对公众人物/名人的未授权、扭曲或不当使用。

discrimination_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V detects demeaning or stereotyping content targeting protected groups or identities.
discrimination_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测针对受保护群体/身份的贬低、刻板印象或歧视内容。

political_sensitivity_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V flags politically sensitive, inflammatory, or controversial political depictions.
political_sensitivity_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测政治敏感、煽动性或争议性政治内容。

illegal_activities_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V detects depictions of criminal or illegal acts such as drugs, theft, or murder.
illegal_activities_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测吸毒、盗窃、谋杀等违法/犯罪行为的画面。

disturbing_content_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V flags horror, grotesque, or psychologically unsettling content far from ordinary reality.
disturbing_content_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测恐怖、猎奇或令人不安的非日常 disturbing 内容。

misinformation_falsehoods_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V detects blatantly false, misleading, or fabricated informational claims in video.
misinformation_falsehoods_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测视频中明显虚假、误导或捏造的 informational 内容。

copyright_trademark_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V flags unauthorized use of copyrighted characters, brands, or trademarked assets.
copyright_trademark_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测未授权使用的版权角色、品牌或商标元素。

temporal_risk_nsfw_rate.en: GPT-4V catches NSFW meaning that emerges only across frames via action sequences, morphing, or contextual subtitles.
temporal_risk_nsfw_rate.zh: GPT-4V 检测仅通过帧间动作、变形或字幕上下文才显现的时序 NSFW 风险。

nsfw_average.en: Mean NSFW violation rate across all 12 safety categories in the official T2VSafetyBench protocol.
nsfw_average.zh: 官方 12 类安全维度 NSFW 违规率的平均值。

visual_quality.en: Aggregates MUSIQ image quality, LAION aesthetic score, and V-JEPA distribution similarity to real embodied videos.
visual_quality.zh: 聚合 MUSIQ 图像质量、LAION 美学分与 V-JEPA 分布相似度，衡量具身场景感知可靠性。

motion_quality.en: Combines RAFT dynamic degree, mean optical-flow intensity, and VFIMamba motion-smoothness for physically meaningful dynamics.
motion_quality.zh: 结合 RAFT 动态幅度、光流强度与 VFIMamba 运动平滑度，评估物理上合理的动态表现。

content_consistency.en: Averages DINO subject consistency, CLIP background consistency, and photometric flow consistency for stable scenes and objects.
content_consistency.zh: 平均 DINO 主体一致、CLIP 背景一致与光度/光流一致，衡量物体与场景的时序稳定性。

physics_adherence.en: Combines Qwen3-VL interaction plausibility with SAM3 trajectory-accuracy (NDTW) for robot–object physical realism.
physics_adherence.zh: 结合 Qwen3-VL 交互物理可信度与 SAM3 轨迹精度（NDTW），评估机器人-物体交互是否符合物理约束。

three_d_accuracy.en: Merges Depth-Anything depth-map alignment with Qwen3-VL perspective plausibility for geometric 3D structure.
three_d_accuracy.zh: 合并深度图对齐与 Qwen3-VL 透视合理性，评估几何三维结构是否可信。

controllability.en: Aggregates VLM instruction-following, Qwen2.5-VL semantic caption alignment, and action-following diversity under varied commands.
controllability.zh: 聚合 VLM 指令跟随、语义描述对齐与不同指令下的 action-following 多样性。

data_engine_success.en: Measures how much synthetic video from the world model improves downstream π0.5 policy success when used as training data.
data_engine_success.zh: 衡量世界模型合成视频作为训练数据对下游 π0.5 策略成功率的提升幅度。

policy_evaluator_correlation.en: Correlates VLM-judged rollout success in the world model with true RoboTwin simulator success across policies.
policy_evaluator_correlation.zh: 比较世界模型 rollout 的 VLM 成功率与 RoboTwin 真实仿真成功率的相关性。

action_planner_success.en: Closed-loop task success when the world model plus inverse-dynamics head plans and executes actions in RoboTwin.
action_planner_success.zh: 世界模型+逆动力学头在 RoboTwin 闭环执行指令时的任务成功率。

human_quality.en: Human ratings of overall video quality, instruction following, and physical plausibility on a normalized 0–100 scale.
human_quality.zh: 人工对整体画质、指令跟随与物理合理性的 0–100 归一化评分。

ewm_score.en: Official mean of 16 normalized perceptual metrics across six WorldArena video-quality sub-dimensions.
ewm_score.zh: 官方 16 项感知指标在六个子维度上归一化后的算术均值（EWMScore）。

image_quality.en: VBench MUSIQ imaging-quality score on generated interactive-world-model videos.
image_quality.zh: 对交互世界模型生成视频运行 VBench MUSIQ 图像质量评分。

brightness_consistency.en: Frame-to-frame luminance stability to avoid exposure jumps during camera or scene motion.
brightness_consistency.zh: 帧间亮度稳定性，避免相机/场景运动时曝光突变。

color_temperature_constraint.en: Hue and color-temperature consistency so white balance does not drift across the clip.
color_temperature_constraint.zh: 色调/色温一致性，防止白平衡在片段中漂移。

sharpness_retention.en: Tenengrad-based sharpness retention checks whether detail stays crisp instead of blurring over time.
sharpness_retention.zh: Tenengrad 锐度保持检验细节是否随时间变糊。

motion_smoothness.en: VBench AMT motion-smoothness score for jerk-free camera and object motion.
motion_smoothness.zh: VBench AMT 运动平滑度，评估相机与物体运动是否无抖动。

trajectory_accuracy.en: VIPe-estimated camera path vs. ground-truth extrinsics measures commanded viewpoint following accuracy.
trajectory_accuracy.zh: VIPe 估计相机轨迹与 GT 外参对比，衡量指令视角跟随精度。

trajectory_tolerance.en: Cosine similarity between generated and reference camera trajectories from VIPe pose NPZ files.
trajectory_tolerance.zh: VIPe 位姿 NPZ 上生成与参考相机轨迹的余弦相似度容忍度。

memory_symmetry.en: Pixel-level forward/backward frame consistency tests whether the model remembers and restores visited views.
memory_symmetry.zh: 像素级正反向帧一致性，检验模型是否记住并还原已访问视角（记忆对称性）。

trajectory_alignment.en: VIPe trajectory symmetry alignment scores bidirectional motion consistency along the camera path.
trajectory_alignment.zh: VIPe 轨迹对称对齐，评估相机路径上双向运动的一致性。

iworldbench_average.en: Mean over available generation-quality, trajectory-following, and memory-ability component metrics.
iworldbench_average.zh: 生成质量、轨迹跟随与记忆能力各分项可用指标的平均值。

active_recognition_success_rate.en: Success rate on active recognition: the agent must explore and identify a target object in embodied scenes.
active_recognition_success_rate.zh: 主动识别任务成功率：智能体需通过探索在具身场景中识别目标物体。

image_goal_navigation_success_rate.en: Whether the agent reaches an image-specified navigation goal within the episode budget.
image_goal_navigation_success_rate.zh: 是否在给定步数内到达图像指定的导航目标。

image_goal_navigation_spl.en: Success weighted by path efficiency (SPL) for image-goal navigation rollouts.
image_goal_navigation_spl.zh: 图像目标导航的成功率按路径效率（SPL）加权。

active_embodied_qa_score.en: Mean QA correctness when the agent must actively gather views to answer embodied questions.
active_embodied_qa_score.zh: 智能体需主动采集视角以回答具身 QA 时的平均正确率。

active_embodied_qa_spl.en: Path-efficiency–weighted score for active embodied question answering.
active_embodied_qa_spl.zh: 主动具身 QA 的路径效率（SPL 风格）加权得分。

robotic_manipulation_success_rate.en: Task success rate on closed-loop robotic manipulation using the world model as a planner/simulator.
robotic_manipulation_success_rate.zh: 以世界模型为规划/仿真器的闭环机器人操作任务成功率。

interaction_trace_consistency.en: Consistency between predicted and executed interaction traces across closed-loop embodied rollouts.
interaction_trace_consistency.zh: 闭环 rollout 中预测交互轨迹与实际执行轨迹的一致性。

world_in_world_average.en: Mean over available closed-loop utility metrics (recognition, navigation, QA, manipulation).
world_in_world_average.zh: 可用闭环效用指标（识别、导航、QA、操作）的平均值。

physics_iq_score.en: Overall Physics-IQ score from weighted spatial IoU between generated and reference physics scenario videos.
physics_iq_score.zh: 生成与参考物理场景视频间加权 spatial IoU 的总体 Physics-IQ 分数。

solid_mechanics.en: Category mean spatial IoU on solid-mechanics scenarios (collisions, rigid-body motion, etc.).
solid_mechanics.zh: 固体力学类场景（碰撞、刚体运动等）的空间 IoU 类别均值。

fluid_dynamics.en: Category mean spatial IoU on fluid-flow and liquid-interaction scenarios.
fluid_dynamics.zh: 流体动力学类场景的空间 IoU 类别均值。

optics.en: Category mean spatial IoU on optics phenomena such as reflection, refraction, and shadows.
optics.zh: 光学现象（反射、折射、阴影等）类场景的空间 IoU 类别均值。

thermodynamics.en: Category mean spatial IoU on heat, phase change, and thermal-process scenarios.
thermodynamics.zh: 热学/相变/热过程类场景的空间 IoU 类别均值。

magnetism.en: Category mean spatial IoU on magnetic attraction, repulsion, and field-interaction scenarios.
magnetism.zh: 磁性吸引、排斥与场相互作用类场景的空间 IoU 类别均值。

physics_iq_average.en: Mean over the five physics-domain category scores when an overall summary row is absent.
physics_iq_average.zh: 无总体汇总行时，五个物理领域类别分数的平均值。

semantic_adherence.en: PhyJudge score for whether video content matches the text prompt (SA criterion G3).
semantic_adherence.zh: PhyJudge 评判视频内容是否与文本 prompt 一致（SA/G3 提示对齐）。

physical_temporal_validity.en: PhyJudge score for physically plausible ordering of events over time (PTV criterion G2).
physical_temporal_validity.zh: PhyJudge 评判物理事件时序是否合乎因果与物理顺序（PTV/G2）。

persistence.en: PhyJudge score for stable object identity, shape, and existence across the whole clip (G1).
persistence.zh: PhyJudge 评判物体身份、形状与存在性在全片是否稳定（G1 持久性）。

solid_body_score.en: Mean PhyJudge rating over solid-body laws (gravity, inertia, collision, material, etc.).
solid_body_score.zh: 固体力学相关规律（重力、惯性、碰撞、材料等）PhyJudge 评分的均值。

fluid_dynamics_score.en: Mean PhyJudge rating over fluid laws (buoyancy, displacement, flow, boundary interaction, continuity).
fluid_dynamics_score.zh: 流体规律（浮力、液面变化、流动、边界交互、连续性）评分的均值。

optics_score.en: Mean PhyJudge rating over reflection and shadow/optical-plausibility criteria.
optics_score.zh: 反射与阴影等光学合理性 criteria 评分的均值。

phyground_overall.en: Mean over general and domain PhyGround judge scores for the full 250-prompt suite.
phyground_overall.zh: 250 条 prompt 上通用与分域 PhyGround 判分指标的平均值。

prompt_consistency.en: VLM judge (1–4) checks correct experimental setup and execution of the science prompt.
prompt_consistency.zh: VLM judge（1–4 分）检验是否正确搭建并执行 prompt 中的科学实验/setup。

phenomenon_congruency.en: VLM judge verifies the expected physical or chemical outcome appears and is scientifically correct.
phenomenon_congruency.zh: VLM judge 验证预期物理/化学现象是否出现且科学正确。

correct_dynamism.en: VLM judge checks that motion and interactions obey relevant physical laws beyond the main phenomenon.
correct_dynamism.zh: VLM judge 检验运动与交互是否遵守除主现象外的相关物理规律。

immutability.en: VLM judge scores whether objects stay unchanged unless the experiment explicitly requires transformation.
immutability.zh: VLM judge 评估物体是否在无实验要求时保持不变（不可变性）。

spatio_temporal_coherence.en: VLM judge detects flicker, teleportation, identity swaps, and unnatural frame-to-frame transitions.
spatio_temporal_coherence.zh: VLM judge 检测闪烁、瞬移、身份互换与非自然帧间过渡。

videoscience_average.en: Weighted combination of the five rubric scores (prompt 20%, phenomenon 25%, dynamism 20%, immutability 15%, coherence 20%).
videoscience_average.zh: 五项 rubric 的加权综合（prompt 20%、现象 25%、动态 20%、不可变 15%、连贯 20%）。

semantic_adherence.en: Mean 1–5 rating of whether the video depicts the requested action and objects (VideoPhy-2 SA).
semantic_adherence.zh: 1–5 分语义 adherence：视频是否呈现 prompt 要求的动作与物体。

physical_commonsense.en: Mean 1–5 rating of physically plausible material interactions in the action-centric clip (PC).
physical_commonsense.zh: 1–5 分物理常识：动作片段中材料交互是否符合物理直觉。

joint_score.en: Fraction of prompts where both semantic adherence and physical commonsense reach the high-quality threshold (≥4/5).
joint_score.zh: 语义 adherence 与物理常识同时达到高质量阈值（≥4/5）的 prompt 比例。

rule_classification_accuracy.en: Accuracy of classifying whether a stated physical rule is followed or violated in the video.
rule_classification_accuracy.zh: 对视频中 stated 物理规则「遵守/违反」分类的准确率。

videophy2_average.en: Primary aggregate over VideoPhy-2 semantic, physical, joint, and rule-grounding metrics.
videophy2_average.zh: VideoPhy-2 语义、物理、联合与规则 grounding 指标的主 aggregate。

semantic_adherence.en: InternVL rubric score for matching teaching-point objects, actions, and narrative in physics education prompts.
semantic_adherence.zh: InternVL 按教学点 rubric 评估物体、动作与叙事是否符合物理教育 prompt。

physics_commonsense.en: Aggregated PC-1/2/3 QA correctness on whether depicted physics matches the teaching concept.
physics_commonsense.zh: PC-1/2/3 问答聚合：所 depict 物理过程是否符合教学概念。

motion_smoothness.en: VBench-style motion-smoothness on explanatory physics videos (smooth pedagogical motion).
motion_smoothness.zh: 对物理解说视频的 VBench 风格运动平滑度评估。

temporal_flickering.en: VBench-style temporal-flickering score for stable frames in instructional clips.
temporal_flickering.zh: 教学片段的 VBench 风格时序闪烁/稳定性评分。

phyeduvideo_average.en: Mean over semantic adherence, physics commonsense, motion smoothness, and temporal flickering when present.
phyeduvideo_average.zh: 语义 adherence、物理常识、运动平滑与时序闪烁可用项的平均值。

scene_consistency.en: DINO patch-token similarity across frames measures stable embodied scene layout and appearance.
scene_consistency.zh: DINO patch 令牌帧间相似度衡量具身场景布局与外观是否稳定。

motion_correctness.en: Trajectory-consistency metrics (Hausdorff/DTW vs. GT) score whether robot/end-effector motion matches expected paths.
motion_correctness.zh: 与 GT 轨迹的 Hausdorff/DTW 等一致性，评估机器人/末端执行器运动是否正确。

semantic_alignment.en: CLIP or BLEU similarity between generated and ground-truth event/general descriptions for the task.
semantic_alignment.zh: 生成与 GT 事件/场景文本描述的 CLIP 或 BLEU 相似度。

diversity.en: CLIP feature dissimilarity across multiple generations from the same initial frame and instruction.
diversity.zh: 同一初始帧与指令下多次生成的 CLIP 特征差异度（多样性）。

ewmbench_average.en: Mean over scene consistency, motion correctness, semantic alignment, and diversity.
ewmbench_average.zh: 场景一致、运动正确、语义对齐与多样性四项的平均值。

dynamics_range.en: DEVIL consistency scores measure whether videos respond to dynamic vs. static prompt pairs with appropriate motion range.
dynamics_range.zh: DEVIL 一致性分数检验动态/静态 prompt 对是否产生匹配的运动幅度（dynamics range）。

dynamics_controllability.en: DEVIL motion-smoothness proxy scores whether generated dynamics follow the intended motion control in prompts.
dynamics_controllability.zh: DEVIL 运动平滑代理分评估生成动态是否受 prompt 意图控制（controllability）。

dynamics_quality.en: Gemini-judged naturalness rates how physically plausible and natural the depicted dynamics appear.
dynamics_quality.zh: Gemini 评判的自然度：所 depict 动态是否物理 plausible 且观感自然。

devil_dynamics_average.en: Mean over dynamics range, controllability, and dynamics-quality components.
devil_dynamics_average.zh: 动态幅度、可控性与动态质量三项的平均值。

physical_commonsense.en: PhyGenEval mean of single-image, multi-frame GPT, and video-stage scores for overall physical plausibility.
physical_commonsense.zh: PhyGenEval 单帧、多帧 GPT 与视频阶段分数均值，衡量整体物理 plausibility。

physical_law_adherence.en: PhyGenEval mean of single-image and multi-frame GPT checks against the prompt's stated physical laws.
physical_law_adherence.zh: PhyGenEval 单帧+多帧 GPT 对 prompt 所述物理规律遵守情况的均值。

semantic_adherence.en: Semantic score from PhyGenEval video/GPT stages for object and event alignment with the prompt.
semantic_adherence.zh: PhyGenEval 视频/GPT 阶段的语义分，评估物体与事件是否与 prompt 对齐。

phygenbench_average.en: Mean over physical commonsense, law adherence, and semantic adherence on 160 prompts.
phygenbench_average.zh: 160 条 prompt 上物理常识、规律遵守与语义 adherence 的平均值。

semantic_adherence.en: Fraction of clips where VideoCon-Physics (or human labels) confirms prompt objects and actions are present (SA=1).
semantic_adherence.zh: VideoCon-Physics/人工标注确认 prompt 物体与动作存在的 clip 比例（SA=1）。

physical_commonsense.en: Fraction of clips judged physically plausible in everyday material interactions (PC=1).
physical_commonsense.zh: 日常材料交互中被判为物理 plausible 的 clip 比例（PC=1）。

joint_score.en: Fraction of clips passing both semantic adherence and physical commonsense simultaneously.
joint_score.zh: 同时通过语义 adherence 与物理常识的 clip 比例。

videophy_average.en: Mean of semantic-adherence and physical-commonsense pass rates.
videophy_average.zh: 语义 adherence 与物理常识通过率的双项均值。

reward.en: Cumulative AI2-THOR simulator reward across interactive household navigation and manipulation episodes toward the language goal.
reward.zh: AI2-THOR 交互式家庭导航与操作 episode 中，朝向语言目标的仿真器累计 reward。

completion.en: Fraction of consecutive CALVIN language-conditioned sub-tasks completed without environment reset.
completion.zh: CALVIN 长时链式语言条件子任务连续完成比例（无环境重置）。

reward.en: Cumulative RL reward on Kinetix procedurally generated 2D rigid-body control puzzles.
reward.zh: Kinetix 程序化 2D 刚体控制 puzzle 上的 RL 累计 reward。

reward.en: Undiscounted task reward accumulated over official ManiSkill SAPIEN manipulation rollouts.
reward.zh: 官方 ManiSkill SAPIEN 操作 rollout 中累计的未折扣任务 reward。

normalized_return.en: ManiSkill episode return scaled against a reference expert or random-policy ceiling for cross-task comparison.
normalized_return.zh: ManiSkill episode return 相对专家或随机策略上界归一化，便于跨任务对比。

reward.en: Cumulative reward on ManiSkill2 dexterous and mobile-manipulation task rollouts.
reward.zh: ManiSkill2 灵巧与移动操作任务 rollout 的累计 reward。

reward.en: Environment reward signal across Meta-World MT50/MLxx meta-RL manipulation skill episodes.
reward.zh: Meta-World MT50/MLxx meta-RL 操作技能 episode 中的环境 reward 信号。

normalized_return.en: Meta-World return scaled to expert performance bounds on the evaluated task suite.
normalized_return.zh: Meta-World return 按评估任务集上的专家表现边界归一化。

reward.en: Cumulative reward on Mikasa memory-augmented embodied task rollouts in the official simulator.
reward.zh: Mikasa 记忆增强具身任务在官方仿真器 rollout 中的累计 reward。

reward.en: Task reward from MoLMoSpaces language-guided navigation and interaction episodes.
reward.zh: MoLMoSpaces 语言引导导航与交互 episode 的任务 reward。

reward.en: Sparse or shaped reward accumulated over RLBench tabletop manipulation episode horizons.
reward.zh: RLBench 桌面操作 episode 内累计的稀疏或 shaped reward。

normalized_return.en: RLBench return normalized to [0, 1] against demonstration or success benchmarks.
normalized_return.zh: RLBench return 相对示范或成功基准归一化到 [0, 1]。

reward.en: Cumulative reward on RoboCasa kitchen manipulation tasks in the official domestic simulator.
reward.zh: RoboCasa 官方家庭仿真器厨房操作任务的累计 reward。

reward.en: Task reward from RoboCerebra long-horizon reasoning and manipulation rollouts.
reward.zh: RoboCerebra 长时推理与操作 rollout 的任务 reward。

reward.en: Cumulative reward on RoboTwin dual-arm manipulation episodes in the official benchmark suite.
reward.zh: RoboTwin 官方 benchmark 双臂操作 episode 的累计 reward。

reward.en: Real-to-sim bridge reward on SimplerEnv visual-matching manipulation evaluation episodes.
reward.zh: SimplerEnv 视觉匹配操作评估 episode 上的 real-to-sim bridge reward。

reward.en: Cumulative reward on VLABench language-conditioned tabletop manipulation rollouts.
reward.zh: VLABench 语言条件桌面操作 rollout 的累计 reward。

t2v_compbench_average.en: Mean over T2V-CompBench compositional categories: attribute binding, spatial relations, action, and numeracy.
t2v_compbench_average.zh: T2V-CompBench 组合式类别（属性绑定、空间关系、动作、数量等）分数的平均值。

fetv_average.en: Mean over normalized FETV fine-grained open-domain scores across content, attribute, complexity, and temporal splits.
fetv_average.zh: FETV 细粒度 open-domain 各内容/属性/复杂度/时间 split 归一化分数的平均值。

camerabench_average.en: Mean over CameraBench binary classification, VQA, retrieval, and caption metric families.
camerabench_average.zh: CameraBench 二分类、VQA、检索与 caption 等 metric 族的平均值。

world_knowledge_average.en: Mean over T2VWorldBench world-knowledge categories testing commonsense scene and object dynamics.
world_knowledge_average.zh: T2VWorldBench 世界知识各类别（常识场景与物体动态）分数的平均值。

videoverse_average.en: Mean over VideoVerse perceptual, semantic, and physics-oriented score families.
videoverse_average.zh: VideoVerse 感知、语义与物理导向各 score 族的平均值。

physvidbench_average.en: Mean over PhysVidBench physical-commonsense and material-interaction score families.
physvidbench_average.zh: PhysVidBench 物理常识与材料交互各 score 族的平均值。

phyfps_bench_gen_average.en: Mean over PhyFPS-Bench-Gen physics-violation detection score families (lower is better).
phyfps_bench_gen_average.zh: PhyFPS-Bench-Gen 物理违规检测各 score 族的平均值（越低越好）。

visual_chronometer_average.en: Mean over Visual Chronometer temporal-consistency score families for time-perception probes (lower is better).
visual_chronometer_average.zh: Visual Chronometer 时间感知 probe 的时序一致性 score 族平均值（越低越好）。
